# Product Specification Document: KiteDesk

## 1. Product Overview
KiteDesk is an autonomous agentic commerce platform deployed on the Kite AI Testnet. It enables AI agents to autonomously discover services, evaluate HTTP 402 (Payment Required) paywalls against a user-defined budget, authorize USDT micro-payments, and record verifiable execution traces on-chain.

## 2. Platform Structure
- Marketing Landing Page (`/`)
- Product Console (`/desk`): wallet, task history, goal agent, budget.

## 3. API Surface
- POST/GET `app/api/agent`, `app/api/history`, `app/api/x402/*`

## 4. Contracts
- `contracts/KiteDeskAttestations.sol` (Hardhat)

## 5. Testable Workflows
- Wallet connect / wrong network / navigation persistence
- Goal submission and agent orchestration (env-dependent)
- x402 verify-and-settle and replay protection (Supabase)
